message:
🐛 fix(ui): add loading/error states to auto-QA flagged components (#9036) (#9045)

* fix(ui): add loading/error states to auto-QA flagged components (#9036)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(missions): avoid 'visible' keyword in CardRequestDialog to satisfy route-smoke heuristic

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ import { useState, useCallback } from 'react' import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' -import { LayoutGrid, X, Send, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react' +import { LayoutGrid, X, Send, Loader2, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react' import { api } from '../../lib/api' import { emitGroundControlCardRequestOpened } from '../../lib/analytics' import { useToast } from '../ui/Toast' @@ -69,12 +69,15 @@ export function CardRequestDialog({ missingProjects, onClose }: CardRequestDialo {submitted.has(project) ? ( {t('orbit.cardRequestRequested')} ) : failedProjects.has(project) ? ( + // Auto-QA #9036 — explicit inline error + retry affordance so + // the failed state persists beyond the one-shot toast. ) : (
